prerequisites: A JustCall account on the Team plan or above, since API access is available starting from the JustCall Team plan (contact help@justcall.io for lower tiers).
JustCall API credentials (API Key and API Secret) generated from the JustCall dashboard.
A start date (the earliest date from which to replicate data), supplied to the required start_date config field.

authMethods.name: API Key and Secret (HTTP Basic auth)
authMethods.summary: JustCall authenticates each request with an API Key and API Secret pair, passed in the Authorization header as HTTP Basic auth (Basic base64(api_key:api_secret)). The connector collects this credential in its required, secret api_key_2 field. Generate the API Key and Secret from the JustCall dashboard under your profile icon > APIs and Webhooks (https://app.justcall.io/app/developersApiCredentials).

setupSteps.title: Confirm API access on your plan
setupSteps.body: Sign in to JustCall and confirm your account is on the Team plan or higher, as API access starts at the Team plan. If you are on a lower tier, contact help@justcall.io to enable access.

setupSteps.title: Generate your API Key and Secret
setupSteps.body: In the JustCall dashboard, click your profile icon and select APIs and Webhooks (or go to https://app.justcall.io/app/developersApiCredentials). Use the copy button beside the API Key and Secret fields to copy your credentials.

setupSteps.title: Provide the credentials to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter your JustCall credentials in the required, secret api_key_2 field. JustCall sends them as HTTP Basic auth in the Authorization header (Basic base64(api_key:api_secret)).

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start date
setupSteps.body: Provide the required start_date field with the earliest date from which the connector should begin replicating JustCall data.
